seeds.value: Track the data integration and streaming industry — product announcements, feature releases, pricing changes, and positioning shifts from market participants. Focus on real-time CDC, ELT/ETL, and infrastructure-as-code segments.
seeds.description: Defines the scope of industry landscape tracking

seeds.value: Compare across these dimensions: ingestion connectors, real-time latency, transformation capabilities, infrastructure management, pricing model, developer experience, security and compliance, and ecosystem integrations.
seeds.description: Dimensions used for feature parity analysis against industry alternatives
